description_long: This is a robust, military-style toolbox with a dark green, angular exterior and reinforced black corner panels. The box features two prominent folding handles on either end, designed for easy carrying, and four heavy-duty latches on the front and sides for secure closure. The top surface is adorned with textured, non-slip black pads and a central recessed area that may house a digital display or label. The sides of the box are slightly beveled, and the overall construction appears to be made from high-impact plastic or composite material, suitable for rugged urban or field environments. The box is likely hollow inside, with ample storage space for tools or equipment, and the latches suggest a tightly sealed, possibly weather-resistant design.
description: A rugged, dark green toolbox with reinforced black panels, folding handles, and secure latches, designed for heavy-duty urban or field use. The top features textured pads and a central recessed area.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing two folding handles, two front latches, and the central recessed area on the lid.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the four latches, both handles, and the detailed top surface with textured pads.
description_view_2: Rear-left view focusing on the handle and side latch, with less detail visible on the top surface.
description_view_3: Rear-right view showing the handle and side latch, with the back panel and minimal top surface detail.
attribute_handle_type: Two rectangular folding handles made of metal with plastic or rubberized grips, designed for ergonomic carrying and flush storage when not in use.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Four heavy-duty clasp latches made of metal, with a robust, snap-shut design for secure closure; no keyholes or combination locks visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied, with no visible trays, drawers, or dividers; exterior does not show any removable or external compartments.
